name: generate-video
description: Generate smooth MP4 videos from web pages using deterministic CDP frame stepping and ffmpeg

interface.shortDescription: Render smooth MP4 videos from web pages and animated visualizations
interface.longDescription: Installs a workflow for rendering deterministic, judder-free MP4 videos from web scenes by stepping Chromium frames over CDP and encoding them with ffmpeg.
defaultPrompt: Generate a smooth demo video from this web page.
Create an animated product teaser and render it to MP4.
